description: Letter from Marduk b. Musa from Alexandria to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1046 (Gil). Information about a shipment that is still is Rashīd and hadn't arrived in Alexandria as expected. Nahray has evidently accused Mardūk of neglecting Nahray's affairs in favor of the business concerns of others, an accusation that amazes and offends Mardūk.
description_he: מכתב ממרדוך בן מוסא, אלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, כ-1046, על משלוח שטרם הגיע מרשיד ועל האשמות שנזנח
